Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a "Disorder of Lipid Metabolism." While the patient has several significant medical issues, including morbid obesity and diabetes, there is no mention of specific lipid disorders such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia. The medications prescribed do not include any lipid-lowering agents, and there is no indication of ongoing management or diagnosis of a lipid metabolism disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
